title: Appointments
description: One scheduled healthcare appointment the user tracks — a doctor visit, lab draw, imaging, or dental. The care/coordinator surfaces upcoming ones and can auto-prepare a visit brief for an imminent appointment.

title.description: a short label for the appointment, e.g. 'Cardiology follow-up'

provider.description: the clinician or facility, e.g. 'Dr. Lee'

prepBriefId.description: the visit brief prepared for this appointment (null until prepared)

note.description: optional context — reason for the visit, things to bring

brief.description: the prep brief compiled for this appointment
